positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of an astronaut exploring a bioluminescent forest. The astronaut, dressed in a clean white and gold suit, stands amidst giant, glowing flora and cosmic, nebulous elements. Strong silhouettes, highly detailed cosmic patterns, clean linework, limited palette of deep indigo, cyan, emerald green, and warm gold. Central composition, symmetrical arrangement, high contrast graphic style, suitable for apparel printing, flat vector graphic feel, studio lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, noise, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, messy composition, grunge, sketch, photography
